reconciliation_note: The 2026-06-19 session-3 handoff was mislabeled 'overnight run complete' — a 4th run (2026-06-20) then implemented R-A1 and opened PR #93, which sat OPEN/unmerged until this session.

state.json (session 3) was stale: it claimed no open PRs and #64 blocked on index-definition.md sign-off. In reality the sign-off was authored in PR #93 (both gates PASS WITH CONDITIONS) and #64 was fully implemented.
PR #93 verified this session (build PASS=344, focused code review of typology matrix + lead-lag vs index-definition.md) and merged by the maintainer via GitHub UI.

open_follow_ups_from_pr93: #53 Kauffälle: discovery + ADR-0003 amendment done; ingestion still TODO — verify price attributes present in public WFS, then DE pair builds ingestion (geo-DS signs off block→PLR interpolation).
#28 D2 price/rent: PLR-level coverage is currently zero — blocked on D1c spatial join (#56) + Bodenrichtwerte ingestion.
L-1: test_dynamik_ordering_guard now supersedes test_mss_gesamtindex_consistency — consider retiring the older test.
L-2: INNER JOIN to POI in int_gentrification_ts silently drops MSS PLRs with no POI snapshot — add a warn-severity row-count test.
L-3: gentrification_index live_data includes uninhabited PLRs as NULL rows; downstream consumers filter on status_index IS NULL.
next_recommended: Maintainer to pick next task (parked as 'decide after #93'). Strongest candidate: #65 R-A2 — re-run E1/E2 to answer whether the 2018 findings still hold (core Epic B/E question).
Secondary in parallel: #71 B2 back-test vs known hotspots (Reuterkiez, Prenzlauer Berg).
Decision needed: accept/reject ADR-0010 (#69) before any R-A9 spatial-inference work.
